name: DIODES INC /DEL/
business: Diodes Incorporated delivers high-quality semiconductor products to leading companies in automotive, industrial, computing, consumer electronics, and communications markets. It offers a broad range of analog, discrete, logic, and mixed-signal products, with over 28,000 products shipped to more than 50,000 customers worldwide.
namedSuppliers: Keylink International (B.V.I.) Inc. and its subsidiaries and affiliates
Jiyuan Crystal Photoelectric Frequency Technology Ltd.

exposures.sentence: the most significant growth for the full year driven by strength in the computing market for AI server-related applications as well as increases in our automotive and industrial end markets.
Computing: Artificial Intelligence (AI) data center including AI server, storage, and edge AI;
Our market focus is on high-growth, end-user applications in the following areas: Automotive: connected driving, comfort/style/safety, electrification/powertrain;
Industrial: embedded systems, industrial automation, medical, energy management, smart buildings;
Communications: 5G networks, smartphones, IP gateways, routers, switches, hubs, fiber optics, and charging solutions
